title: 愛愛童話：糖果屋
description:
Not long after Hansel and Gretel became adults, their father passed away.
With his death, the warmth of their family slowly began to fall apart.

Then, one day, their stepmother started bringing mysterious cakes home.
As the sweet aroma filled the house, the once distant relationship between the three began to change.

Stepmother, Gretel, and Hansel—
Will the distance closing between them lead this family back to happiness, or into an even sweeter trap?【Game Features】─────────────────────────────────────────────▣• A Sweet Temptation in a Dark Fairy Tale: The classic tale of Hansel and Gretel is reimagined as a modern adult fairy tale. No forest. No breadcrumbs. Only a mysterious cake shop and a sweet trap slowly spiraling out of control.

• Mature Heroines with Distinct Personalities: The sharp-tongued tsundere Gretel, the gentle yet dangerous stepmother, and more characters waiting for you to uncover their true nature!

• Addictive Match-3 Gameplay: Strawberry cake, chocolate cake, cream cake, blueberry tart, matcha roll… Clear colorful dessert pieces and melt their defenses one stage at a time.

• Enjoy Everything with One Hand: Simple and intuitive match-3 controls let you progress through the story, unlock memories, and enjoy a dark fairy tale woven from beautiful heroines and irresistible sweets.

• Memory Mode to Relive Your Sweet Moments: Once a scene is unlocked, you can revisit it anytime in the memory gallery and savor those hard-earned sweet memories.

• I Really Couldn’t Think of Anything Else: After careful research, I realized this plays just like a regular match-3 game. But I still worked hard to make it! So clear those sweets and enjoy this deliciously dangerous fairy tale!
【Gameplay】─────────────────────────────────────────────▣
This is a dark fairy tale game that combines beautiful heroines, dessert-themed match-3 puzzles, and GALGAME-style storytelling.

You play as Hansel, witnessing the changes brought by a mysterious cake within a family that has grown cold after the death of his father.
Clear match-3 stages to progress through the story, unlock character events, and gradually uncover the secrets behind Candy House.

Classic match-3 puzzle gameplay meets heroine-driven storytelling and sweet dessert-themed presentation!
No need to worry about getting stuck—plenty of items make it easy to enter EASY MODE.
description_short: After their father’s death, Hansel’s family falls apart. But when his stepmother brings home mysterious cakes from Candy House, the lost warmth begins to return. Clear dessert match-3 stages, unlock heroine events, and uncover the sweet secret.
